'''鈭歞h-sh-y''' ('''dhashaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnetize|magnetize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnetize|magnetize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-sh-y
|-
! Lemma
| dhashaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhashayithi|dhashayithi]] || [[word:dhashayiji|dhashayiji]] || [[word:dhashayishi|dhashayishi]] || [[word:dhashayi|dhashayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashayuthuth|dhashayuthuth]] || [[word:dhashayujuj|dhashayujuj]] || [[word:dhashayushush|dhashayushush]] || [[word:dhashay|dhashay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashayuthu|dhashayuthu]] || [[word:dhashayuju|dhashayuju]] || [[word:dhashayushu|dhashayushu]] || [[word:dhashayu|dhashayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashayufuth|dhashayufuth]] || [[word:dhashayufuj|dhashayufuj]] || [[word:dhashayufush|dhashayufush]] || [[word:dhashayuf|dhashayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhashayethe|dhashayethe]] || [[word:dhashayeje|dhashayeje]] || [[word:dhashayeshe|dhashayeshe]] || [[word:dhashaye|dhashaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashayothoth|dhashayothoth]] || [[word:dhashayojoj|dhashayojoj]] || [[word:dhashayoshosh|dhashayoshosh]] || [[word:dhashay|dhashay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashayotho|dhashayotho]] || [[word:dhashayojo|dhashayojo]] || [[word:dhashayosho|dhashayosho]] || [[word:dhashayo|dhashayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashayofoth|dhashayofoth]] || [[word:dhashayofoj|dhashayofoj]] || [[word:dhashayofosh|dhashayofosh]] || [[word:dhashayof|dhashayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhashay忙th忙|dhashay忙th忙]] || [[word:dhashay忙j忙|dhashay忙j忙]] || [[word:dhashay忙sh忙|dhashay忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhashay忙|dhashay忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashayathath|dhashayathath]] || [[word:dhashayajaj|dhashayajaj]] || [[word:dhashayashash|dhashayashash]] || [[word:dhashay|dhashay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashayatha|dhashayatha]] || [[word:dhashayaja|dhashayaja]] || [[word:dhashayasha|dhashayasha]] || [[word:dhashaya|dhashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashayafath|dhashayafath]] || [[word:dhashayafaj|dhashayafaj]] || [[word:dhashayafash|dhashayafash]] || [[word:dhashayaf|dhashayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhashayasha|dhashayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhashayasha|godhashayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhashayasha|gokidhashayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhashayn眉sha|dhashayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhashaynkn眉sha|godhashaynkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashayn眉sha|gokidhashayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhashaysh毛sha|dhashaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhashaynksh毛sha|godhashaynksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhashaysh毛sha|gokidhashaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashayrosha|dhashayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashaynkrosha|godhashaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashayrosha|gokidhashayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashaymusha|dhashaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashaynkmusha|godhashaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashaymusha|gokidhashaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhashaysherasha|dhashaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhashaynksherasha|godhashaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhashaysherasha|gokidhashaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhashayngasha|dhashayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhashaynkngasha|godhashaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhashayngasha|gokidhashayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhashayasha|dhashayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhashaynkyasha|godhashaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhashayasha|gokidhashayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhashayamasha|dhashayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhashaynkyamasha|godhashaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhashayamasha|gokidhashayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhashayn眉sh毛sha|dhashayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhashaynkn眉sh毛sha|godhashaynkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhashayn眉sh毛sha|gokidhashayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashayn眉rosha|dhashayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashaynkn眉rosha|godhashaynkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashayn眉rosha|gokidhashayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashayn眉musha|dhashayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashaynkn眉musha|godhashaynkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashayn眉musha|gokidhashayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhashaysh毛n眉sha|dhashaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhashaynksh毛n眉sha|godhashaynksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashaysh毛n眉sha|gokidhashaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashaysh毛rosha|dhashaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashaynksh毛rosha|godhashaynksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashaysh毛rosha|gokidhashaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashaysh毛musha|dhashaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashaynksh毛musha|godhashaynksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashaysh毛musha|gokidhashaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhashayron眉sha|dhashayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhashaynkron眉sha|godhashaynkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashayron眉sha|gokidhashayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhashayrosh毛sha|dhashayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhashaynkrosh毛sha|godhashaynkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhashayrosh毛sha|gokidhashayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashayromusha|dhashayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashaynkromusha|godhashaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashayromusha|gokidhashayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhashaymun眉sha|dhashaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhashaynkmun眉sha|godhashaynkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashaymun眉sha|gokidhashaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhashaymush毛sha|dhashaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhashaynkmush毛sha|godhashaynkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhashaymush毛sha|gokidhashaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashaymurosha|dhashaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashaynkmurosha|godhashaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashaymurosha|gokidhashaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhashay|dhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙sh忙y|dh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhashay|hodhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙sh忙y|hodh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhashay|hohodhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙sh忙y|hohodh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhashay|n眉dhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙sh忙y|n眉dh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhashay|n眉n眉dhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙sh忙y|n眉n眉dh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhashay|n茂dhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙sh忙y|n茂dh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhashay|n茂n茂dhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙sh忙y|n茂n茂dh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhashay|ludhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙sh忙y|ludh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhashay|luludhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙sh忙y|luludh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhashay|lidhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙sh忙y|lidh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhashay|lilidhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙sh忙y|lilidh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhashay|kodhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙sh忙y|kodh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhashay|kokodhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙sh忙y|kokodh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhashay|kedhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙sh忙y|kedh忙sh忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhashay|kekedhashay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙sh忙y|kekedh忙sh忙y]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
